# SSOT Registry

- The registry is the canonical source for governed software assurance entities.
- Boundaries freeze scoped delivery targets before certification and release.
- Claims link behavior to tests and evidence instead of relying on prose assertions.

## Pages
- [Govern software truth from decision to release.](https://ssot-registry.swarmauri.com/) - A governed single source of truth for ADRs, specs, features, claims, tests, evidence, boundaries, and releases.
- [ADRs what is for Developers](https://ssot-registry.swarmauri.com/features/developer/adrs/what-is/) - Planned Features page combining ADRs, what-is, and Developer content for SEO, AEO, and AiEO discovery.
- [ADRs what is for Architects](https://ssot-registry.swarmauri.com/features/architect/adrs/what-is/) - Planned Features page combining ADRs, what-is, and Architect content for SEO, AEO, and AiEO discovery.
